subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the unknowable Beloved, Who is worthy and befitting of the adoration of all who dwell in the heavens and on earth through but a word of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب لن یعرفی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع من فی السموات و الارض را بحرفی از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @nearness and remoteness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
